mnemonics: CHEST=Constant effort, Human expertise, Simple tools
keyPoints: Cohesion, Effort, Starvation, Teamwork= Factors affecting estimation model accuracy
Heuristics= Models like Hertz's Estimation Method and Thom's Estimation Model
Expert Judgment= Requires experience, skills and domain knowledge of the project
Historical Data= To estimate the effort required for similar projects
Scaling Factors= To adjust the effort required for the project
Team Size= Effect on estimation accuracy, larger teams tend to be less accurate
Experience= Role of experience in estimation accuracy, more experienced individuals tend to be more accurate
